message:
fix(app): region leak on spawn failure + drop bomb on stop/join error path

CompiledApp::start now cleans up the root region if supervisor.spawn()
fails, preventing an orphaned Open region with no handle.

AppHandle::stop() and join() now defuse the drop bomb before returning
RegionNotFound errors, preventing a panic when the consumed handle is
dropped on the error path.

Added regression tests: stop_region_not_found_does_not_panic,
join_region_not_found_does_not_panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
